_publications._publicationTitle: RABL6A Regulates Schwann Cell Senescence in an RB1-Dependent Manner.

_contextSnippet: Two different Rabl6 knockout MEF cultures were generated from separate embryos and both displayed reduced proliferation compared to the wildtype culture
details: Successfully used to generate Rabl6 knockout mouse embryonic fibroblasts that displayed reduced proliferation and premature senescence
